axioms.name: Difference may operate prior to registration
axioms.statement: A difference may affect system dynamics before it is recognized, named, measured, or institutionally acknowledged.

axioms.name: Detection requires threshold crossing
axioms.statement: Detection occurs only when a latent difference crosses the threshold sufficient for event registration within the current interpretive frame.

axioms.name: Irreversibility begins at registration
axioms.statement: A difference becomes irreversibly consequential only when it is registered as an event and re-entered into later state formation.

axioms.name: Authority governs detection bandwidth
axioms.statement: Every authority regime determines which differences are detectable, ignorable, suppressible, or unspeakable.

axioms.name: Innovation emerges from the pre-detected
axioms.statement: Innovation occurs when a previously pre-detected difference becomes registrable under a revised frame.
